_base.description: Base config that all subsequent analyzers, even unspecified will inherit.

exclude_files.third_party/: exclude all third_party code for all analyzers
exclude_files.external/: exclude all third_party code for all analyzers

SA5011.description: nogo provides no facts for the stdlib, so staticcheck cannot know testing.T.Fatal is noreturn and false-positives on the `if x == nil { t.Fatal(...) }` guard idiom.

exclude_files._test\\.go$: exclude tests; the t.Fatal guard idiom false-positives without stdlib facts
